author: calghar
description: Save and categorise links into your knowledge base using AI. Supports Claude, Ollama, and OpenRouter. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Farooq Shaikh
manifest.description: Save and categorise links into your knowledge base using AI. Supports Claude, Ollama, and OpenRouter.
manifest.name: LinkVault

name: LinkVault

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## LinkVault 1.1.0

**Minimum Obsidian version:** 1.11.4

See auto-generated changelog below for details.


## What's Changed
* feat: store API key in Obsidian SecretStorage by @calghar in https://github.com/calghar/LinkVault/pull/1
* feat(index): auto-update KB index via a managed region by @calghar in https://github.com/calghar/LinkVault/pull/3
* feat(routing): stop misrouting links, create a note when nothing fits by @calghar in https://github.com/calghar/LinkVault/pull/4
* Unit tests for the pure functions, and a README split into docs/ by @calghar in https://github.com/calghar/LinkVault/pull/5


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/calghar/LinkVault/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0
